payload.answer: I couldn’t save this article because the URL appears malformed and the fetch failed with a 404/network error. I can only remember the article if you provide a valid, accessible URL or paste the article content.

entity_resolution.reason: The provided article URL is malformed and the mock fetch result indicates a 404/network error, so no durable article content can be verified or stored.
